Choosing right
2 OR 01
3 OR 12

6 OR 45

Selected
0 XOR 12n
1 XOR 23n
2 OR 01
3 OR 12
4 OR 23
5 OR 34
6 OR 45
7 OR 56

Applying to 01100001
Input
I 0 = 0
I 1 = 1
I 2 = 1
I 3 = 0
I 4 = 0
I 5 = 0
I 6 = 0
I 7 = 1
Output
0 XOR 12n = NOT(XOR 12) = NOT(XOR(I 1,I 2)) = NOT(XOR(1,1)) = NOT(0) = 1
1 XOR 23n = NOT(XOR 23) = NOT(XOR(I 2,I 3)) = NOT(XOR(1,0)) = NOT(1) = 0
2 OR 01 = OR(I 0,I 1) = OR(0,1) = 1
3 OR 12 = OR(I 1,I 2) = OR(1,1) = 1
4 OR 23 = OR(I 2,I 3) = OR(1,0) = 1
5 OR 34 = OR(I 3,I 4) = OR(0,0) = 0
6 OR 45 = OR(I 4,I 5) = OR(0,0) = 0
7 OR 56 = OR(I 5,I 6) = OR(0,0) = 0

\boxed{10111000}
